permissions.fallback_msg: The write-unit-tests skill needs to read source and test files within the workspace to understand existing code structure and test patterns.
The write-unit-tests skill needs to create or modify test files (e.g., Vec.test.ts, SelectTool.test.ts) within the workspace. Please confirm before writing.
The write-unit-tests skill needs to read version-controlled source files in packages/editor and packages/tldraw to understand implementations being tested.
The write-unit-tests skill needs to create or modify version-controlled test files alongside source files. Please confirm before writing.
The write-unit-tests skill needs to run test commands (e.g., 'cd packages/tldraw && yarn test run') to verify tests pass. Please confirm before executing.
